  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system where the consent record originated (e.g., member portal, call center).']
  state_of_residence varchar [note: 'State code of the member\'s residence at time of consent.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the consent record.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the consent document for audit tracking.']

  Note: 'Manages member consent and authorization records required under HIPAA Privacy Rule and state privacy laws. Tracks consent type (PHI disclosure authorization, ROI — Release of Information, marketing opt-in, research participation, care management program enrollment consent, advance directive), consent status (active, revoked, expired), consent date, expiration date, authorized recipient, scope of disclosure, revocation date, and consent collection method (written, electronic, verbal with attestation). Supports HIPAA minimum necessary standard, 42 CFR Part 2 (substance abuse), and state mental health privacy requirements.'
}

Table member.disenrollment {
  disenrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for disenrollment']
  disenrollment_health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan the member was enrolled in before disenrollment.']
  disenrollment_new_plan_health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a new plan if the member re‑enrolls immediately after disenrollment.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who is being disenrolled.']
  processed_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Needed for audit of disenrollment processing; regulatory reports require identifying the employee who processed each disenrollment.']
  appeal_rights_notified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member was notified of appeal rights.']
  cobro_eligibility boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the member qualifies for COBRA continuation coverage.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the disenrollment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for any monetary amounts.']
  disenrollment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the disenrollment event, used for external reporting and audit.']
  disenrollment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the disenrollment request.']
  effective_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the disenrollment becomes effective for coverage purposes.']
  eligibility_loss_indicator boolean [note: 'True if disenrollment is due to loss of eligibility.']
  notice_sent_date date [note: 'Date the required notice of disenrollment was sent to the member.']
  processed_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier that processed the disenrollment.']
  processed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the disenrollment was processed.']
  reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing why the member is disenrolling.']
  reason_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the disenrollment reason.']
  refund_adjustment_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Adjustments (e.g., fees, penalties) applied to the gross refund.']
  refund_gross_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total gross amount refunded to the member as part of disenrollment.']
  refund_net_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Net amount actually paid to the member after adjustments.']
  request_date date [note: 'Date the member or source submitted the disenrollment request.']
  source varchar [note: 'Origin of the disenrollment request.']
  termination_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the disenrollment termination.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the disenrollment record.']

  Note: 'Captures the formal disenrollment event when a member voluntarily or involuntarily terminates health plan coverage. Records disenrollment effective date, disenrollment reason code (voluntary termination, non-payment of premium, loss of eligibility, plan termination, death, fraud, relocation out of service area), disenrollment request date, source of disenrollment (member request, employer group, CMS, state Medicaid agency), notice sent date, and appeal rights notification. Supports CMS disenrollment reporting for Medicare Advantage, Medicaid managed care disenrollment rules, and COBRA qualifying event triggering.'
}

Table member.segment {
  segment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for segment']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who performed the last audit action.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to which the segment applies.']
  audit_reason varchar [note: 'Reason or comment captured for the audit change.']
  chronic_condition_code varchar [note: 'ICD‑10 code representing the chronic condition driving the segment.']
  chronic_condition_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member has a chronic condition relevant to the segment.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the segment record was first created.']
  dual_eligible boolean [note: 'True if the member is eligible for both Medicare and Medicaid.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the segment assignment becomes effective.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date when the segment assignment ends or is superseded (nullable).']
  hcc_risk_score_tier varchar [note: 'Tier of HCC risk score assigned to the member.']
  is_current boolean [note: 'True if this record represents the member\'s active segment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes related to the segment assignment.']
  risk_tier varchar [note: 'Risk tier assigned to the member within the segment.']
  sdoh_risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical score (0‑100) quantifying social determinants of health risk.']
  segment_category varchar [note: 'High-level classification of the segment (e.g., risk, chronic, sdoh, hcc, star, dual, snp). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: risk|chronic|sdoh|hcc|star|dual|snp — promote to reference product]']
  segment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the segment criteria and purpose.']
  segment_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the segment.']
  segment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the segment record.']
  segmentation_model_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the predictive or rules‑based model that generated the segment.']
  segmentation_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the segment assignment.']
  snp_eligibility boolean [note: 'Indicates eligibility for a Special Needs Plan.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that generated or supplied the segment.']
  star_rating_cohort varchar [note: 'Star rating cohort classification for quality measurement programs.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the segment record.']

  Note: 'Classifies members into business-defined segments for population health management, risk stratification, and targeted outreach. Tracks segment type (risk tier: low/medium/high/catastrophic, chronic condition flag, rising risk indicator, care management eligibility, SDOH risk score, HCC risk score tier, STAR rating cohort, dual eligible status, SNP eligibility), segment effective date, segmentation model version, and segmentation source (predictive model, claims-based, care manager assigned). Used by care management, utilization management, and population health programs. Distinct from analytics — this is the operational classification record.'
}

Table member.member_grievance {
  member_grievance_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each grievance record.']
  benefit_package_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific benefit package linked to the member\'s coverage.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or investigator assigned to handle the grievance.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan under which the member is enrolled at the time of the grievance.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who filed the grievance.']
  provider_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: REQUIRED: Grievances are often filed against a specific provider; linking enables tracking, reporting, and regulatory compliance.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Grievance Management Report requires linking each grievance to the provider network involved, enabling compliance tracking and root‑cause analysis.']
  cms_reportable_indicator boolean [note: 'True if the grievance is reportable under CMS grievance reporting requirements (e.g., Medicare Advantage).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the grievance record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency code for the disputed amount.']
  disputed_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount that the member is contesting, if applicable (e.g., billing dispute).']
  grievance_number varchar [note: 'Business‑visible identifier assigned to the grievance, often used in member communications and regulatory reporting.']
  grievance_source varchar [note: 'Channel through which the grievance was received.']
  investigation_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the investigation concluded.']
  investigation_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the investigation of the grievance began.']
  issue_category_code varchar [note: 'More granular classification of the grievance issue within the selected grievance type.']
  lob_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the line of business (e.g., commercial, Medicare, Medicaid, CHIP) associated with the member.']
  member_grievance_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the grievance.']
  member_satisfaction_score varchar [note: 'Member‑reported satisfaction rating of the grievance resolution on a 1‑5 scale.']
  received_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the grievance was first recorded in the system.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the grievance must be reported to regulatory bodies (true) or not (false).']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the grievance was formally resolved.']
  resolution_description varchar [note: 'Narrative details of the actions taken or explanation provided to resolve the grievance.']
  resolution_type_code varchar [note: 'Indicates how the grievance was addressed, e.g., corrective action, explanation, refund, no action, or other.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two‑letter US state abbreviation where the grievance originated or is applicable.']
  type_code varchar [note: 'Categorizes the grievance by primary concern area such as quality of care, access, provider attitude, billing/financial, or benefit/coverage.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the grievance record.']

  Note: 'Operational record of formal member grievances (non-appeal complaints) filed against the health plan regarding service quality, access to care, provider behavior, billing disputes, or administrative issues. Tracks grievance receipt date, grievance type code (quality of care, access, attitude/service, billing/financial, benefit/coverage), issue category, member-reported description, assigned investigator, investigation timeline, resolution date, resolution type, resolution description, member satisfaction with resolution, regulatory reporting flag, and CMS/state DOI reportable indicator. Distinct from the appeal domain which handles coverage determination and claim denial disputes — grievances are expressions of dissatisfaction, not requests for coverage reversal. Supports CMS grievance reporting requirements for Medicare Advantage (42 CFR §422.564) and Medicaid managed care (42 CFR §438.402), state DOI complaint reporting, and NCQA accreditation standards (CR standards).'
}

Table member.member_communication {
  member_communication_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each communication record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Communications (ID cards, benefit notices) must be linked to the member\'s active health plan for ACA disclosure and audit compliance.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who is the recipient or sender of the communication.']
  pharmacy_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: PHARMACY_BENEFIT_MANAGEMENT: Member pharmacy BIN/PCN data must be linked to the contracted pharmacy vendor for claim routing and CMS reporting.']
  provider_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: REQUIRED: Personalized communications (e.g., welcome letters) need a direct link to the provider to pull correct PCP details for each member.']
  sent_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Communications to members are often sent by a staff employee; tracking sender supports compliance and quality monitoring.']
  acknowledgment_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the member has acknowledged receipt of the communication.']
  body varchar [note: 'Full textual content of the communication (may be truncated for storage).']
  card_format varchar [note: 'Delivery format of the ID card (physical mail, digital PDF, or mobile app).']
  card_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ID card.']
  card_type varchar [note: 'Type of ID card referenced when the communication involves card issuance.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Medium used to deliver the communication.']
  communication_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the communication for tracking and reference.']
  communication_type varchar [note: 'Category of the outbound/inbound communication (e.g., Explanation of Benefits, Welcome Kit, ID Card, Annual Notice of Change, Evidence of Coverage, Summary of Benefits and Coverage).']
  copay_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Standard copay amount displayed on the ID card.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the communication record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  customer_service_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number for member inquiries, displayed on the communication or card.']
  delivery_confirmation boolean [note: 'True when delivery of the communication has been confirmed (e.g., signed receipt).']
  delivery_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the communication was successfully delivered to the member (if applicable).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the communication becomes effective (e.g., start of coverage notice).']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the communication is no longer considered active (e.g., card expiry).']
  group_number varchar [note: 'Employer or group identifier shown on the ID card.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Two‑letter ISO 639‑1 code representing the language of the communication.']
  member_communication_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the communication.']
  member_id_displayed varchar [note: 'Member identifier printed on the ID card (may be masked for privacy).']
  pharmacy_bin varchar [note: 'Bank Identification Number for pharmacy claims shown on the card.']
  pharmacy_group_number varchar [note: 'Group number for pharmacy benefits displayed on the card.']
  pharmacy_pcn varchar [note: 'Processor Control Number for pharmacy claims shown on the card.']
  regulatory_flag boolean [note: 'True when the communication satisfies a mandatory regulatory requirement (e.g., CMS‑mandated notice).']
  replacement_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why an ID card was re‑issued (e.g., lost, stolen, expired).']
  send_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the communication was sent or initiated.']
  subject varchar [note: 'Subject line or title of the communication.']
  template_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the communication template used.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the communication record.']

  Note: 'Tracks all outbound and inbound communications with members and manages ID card issuance and fulfillment. Communication types include: EOB mailings, welcome kits, ID card issuance (physical and digital), Annual Notice of Change (ANOC), Evidence of Coverage (EOC), SBC (Summary of Benefits and Coverage), care gap notifications, wellness program invitations, and regulatory notices. Records communication type, channel (mail, email, SMS, phone, portal), send date, delivery status, template version, regulatory requirement flag (e.g., CMS-mandated notice), language used, and member acknowledgment status. For ID card communications: tracks card type (medical, dental, vision, pharmacy, combined), card format (physical, digital/mobile), card status (active, replaced, lost/stolen, expired), plan name on card, group number, member ID displayed, PCP name (for HMO cards), copay amounts displayed, pharmacy BIN/PCN/Group numbers, customer service phone numbers, replacement reason, and delivery confirmation. Supports CMS notice compliance tracking, NCQA member communication standards, member engagement measurement, and digital ID card provisioning via member portal.'
}

Table member.id_card {
  id_card_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key for the ID card record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: ID cards are issued per health plan; linking enables tracking issuance per plan for regulatory reporting.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to whom the card is issued.']
  barcode varchar [note: 'Machine-readable barcode value encoded on the card.']
  card_format varchar [note: 'Delivery format of the card: physical plastic, digital image, or mobile app representation.']
  card_number varchar [note: 'The alphanumeric identifier printed on the ID card, used for member identification.']
  card_type varchar [note: 'Category of coverage the card provides (e.g., medical, dental).']
  card_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the card design/layout.']
  copay_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Standard copayment amount shown on the card for office visits.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the card record was created in the system.']
  customer_service_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number printed on the card for member support.']
  delivery_confirmation_date date [note: 'Date when delivery of the card was confirmed.']
  delivery_method varchar [note: 'Method used to deliver the card to the member.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the card is no longer valid.']
  external_system_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the card record in the source operational system (e.g., Facets).']
  group_number varchar [note: 'Employer or group identifier shown on the card.']
  id_card_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the card.']
  is_primary boolean [note: 'Indicates if this card is the member\'s primary ID card.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date the card was originally issued to the member.']
  language_preference varchar [note: 'Member\'s preferred language for card language.']
  last_status_change_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the card status last changed.']
  magnetic_stripe_data varchar [note: 'Data encoded on the magnetic stripe of the physical card.']
  pcp_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary care physician displayed on HMO cards.']
  pharmacy_bin varchar [note: 'Bank Identification Number for pharmacy benefits.']
  pharmacy_group_number varchar [note: 'Group number used for pharmacy benefit routing.']
  pharmacy_pcn varchar [note: 'Processor Control Number for pharmacy claims.']
  replacement_date date [note: 'Date a replacement card was issued, if applicable.']
  replacement_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the card was replaced.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the card record.']

  Note: 'Manages the issuance and tracking of member health insurance ID cards (physical and digital). Records card issue date, card type (medical, dental, vision, pharmacy, combined), card format (physical, digital/mobile), card status (active, replaced, lost/stolen, expired), plan name on card, group number, member ID displayed, PCP name (for HMO cards), copay amounts displayed, pharmacy BIN/PCN/Group numbers, and customer service phone numbers. Tracks card replacement requests, reason for replacement, and delivery confirmation. Supports member services ID card fulfillment workflows and digital ID card provisioning via member portal.'
}

Table member.authorized_representative {
  authorized_representative_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for authorized_representative']
  authorization_document_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the stored document that grants the authorization.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who performed the last audit action on the record.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the member for whom the representative is authorized.']
  audit_reason varchar [note: 'Reason provided for the audit change.']
  authorization_end_date date [note: 'Date when the representative\'s authority expires or is terminated.']
  authorization_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of actions the representative is permitted to perform on behalf of the member.']
  authorization_start_date date [note: 'Date when the representative\'s authority becomes effective.']
  authorization_status varchar [note: 'Status of the authorization request process before it becomes active.']
  authorized_representative_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the authorization.']
  bar_number varchar [note: 'Professional bar registration number for attorney representatives.']
  contact_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the representative\'s mailing address.']
  contact_city varchar [note: 'City of the representative\'s mailing address.']
  contact_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code of the representative\'s mailing address.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the representative.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for the representative.']
  contact_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the representative\'s mailing address.']
  contact_state_code varchar [note: 'State abbreviation for the representative\'s mailing address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the authorized representative record was created.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'External reference or path to the authorization document (e.g., URL or file ID).']
  effective_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the authorization became effective (derived from start date).']
  is_primary_representative boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this representative is the primary point of contact for the member.']
  license_expiration_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the professional license.']
  license_state varchar [note: 'State or jurisdiction that issued the professional license.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments or remarks about the authorization.']
  professional_license_number varchar [note: 'License number for non-attorney professionals (e.g., healthcare provider license).']
  relationship_to_member varchar [note: 'Describes the legal or personal relationship between the representative and the member.']
  representative_name varchar [note: 'Legal full name of the authorized representative.']
  representative_type varchar [note: 'Category of the representative based on role and relationship to member.']
  revocation_date date [note: 'Date when the authorization was formally revoked, if applicable.']
  revocation_reason varchar [note: 'Reason provided for revoking the representative\'s authority.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system where the record originated (e.g., Facets, QNXT).']
  termination_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the authorization terminated (derived from end date).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']

  Note: 'Master record for individuals or entities authorized to act on behalf of a member in the appeals and grievances process — attorneys, patient advocates, family members with POA, and provider representatives. Captures representative type, authorization scope (appeal only, grievance only, all actions), authorization start and end dates, authorization document reference, relationship to member, contact information, and bar number or professional license where applicable. Distinct from the member record in the member domain. SSOT for appeal representation authority.'
}

Table member.member_enrollment {
  member_enrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the enrollment association']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to subscriber']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to care program']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the enrollment ends or is terminated']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the enrollment becomes effective']
  enrollment_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the enrollment record']
  enrollment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, terminated)']
  enrollment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of enrollment (e.g., mandatory, optional)']
  reason varchar [note: 'Reason for enrollment, often derived from eligibility criteria']

  Note: 'This association product represents the enrollment contract between a subscriber and a care program. It captures enrollment-specific data such as enrollment number, status, effective dates, type, and reason. Each record links one subscriber to one care program.. Existence Justification: Subscribers can enroll in multiple care programs and each care program can have many subscribers. The enrollment is an operational record that is created, updated, and deleted by staff and includes attributes such as enrollment dates, status, type, and reason. The business treats enrollment as a distinct entity (Enrollment) that is queried and reported on.'
}

Table member.policy {
  policy_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for policy']
  identity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the insured member associated with the policy.']
  parent_policy_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on policy (parent_policy_id)']
  plan_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the plan or product associated with the policy.']
  subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to member.subscriber. Business justification: Policy is a child of subscriber; adding subscriber_id FK establishes the 1:N relationship and removes the silo.']
  coverage_end_date date [note: 'Date when coverage under the policy ends.']
  coverage_limit_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary limit for covered services under the policy.']
  coverage_limit_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the coverage limit amount.']
  coverage_limit_type varchar [note: 'Scope of the coverage limit (e.g., lifetime, annual).']
  coverage_start_date date [note: 'Date when coverage under the policy begins.']
  coverage_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the coverage portion of the policy.']
  coverage_type varchar [note: 'Type of coverage plan (e.g., HMO, PPO).']
  deductible_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount the insured must pay before coverage applies.']
  deductible_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the deductible amount.']
  out_of_pocket_max_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum amount the insured pays in a benefit year.']
  out_of_pocket_max_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the out-of-pocket maximum amount.']
  policy_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the policy becomes effective.']
  policy_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the policy expires if not renewed.']
  policy_number varchar [note: 'Human-readable policy number assigned by the insurer.']
  policy_renewal_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount paid for the policy renewal.']
  policy_renewal_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the renewal amount.']
  policy_renewal_date date [note: 'Date when the policy renewal was processed.']
  policy_renewal_deductible_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Deductible portion of the renewal payment.']
  policy_renewal_deductible_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the renewal deductible amount.']
  policy_renewal_out_of_pocket_max_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Out-of-pocket maximum for the renewal period.']
  policy_renewal_out_of_pocket_max_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the renewal out-of-pocket maximum amount.']
  policy_renewal_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Premium portion of the renewal payment.']
  policy_renewal_premium_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the renewal premium amount.']
  policy_renewal_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the policy renewal process.']
  policy_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the policy.']
  policy_termination_date date [note: 'Date when the policy was terminated.']
  policy_termination_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for policy termination.']
  policy_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the policy based on the insured entity type.']
  premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount to be paid for the policy coverage.']
  premium_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the premium amount.']
  premium_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the premium is billed.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for policy. Referenced by policy_id.'
}
