  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the episode of care ends or is terminated. Nullable for ongoing episodes.']
  episode_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the episode of care, used in communications and reporting.']
  length_of_stay_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the patient stayed in the facility during this episode.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the episode of care within its lifecycle.']
  medical_necessity_decision varchar [note: 'Decision on medical necessity for the episode.']
  medical_necessity_decision_date date [note: 'Date the medical necessity decision was made.']
  net_amount_due decimal(15,2) [note: 'Net amount due after applying payments and adjustments.']
  primary_diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD-10 code representing the primary diagnosis for the episode.']
  prior_authorization_decision_date date [note: 'Date the prior authorization decision was made.']
  prior_authorization_request_date date [note: 'Date the prior authorization was requested.']
  prior_authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the prior authorization request.']
  procedure_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of procedure codes (e.g., CPT) performed during the episode.']
  secondary_diagnosis_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ICD-10 codes for secondary diagnoses.']
  total_adjustments decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total adjustments applied to the charges (e.g., discounts, write-offs).']
  total_charges decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total billed amount for services rendered in this episode.']
  total_payments decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total payments received from insurer and patient for this episode.']
  updated_at timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the episode record.']
  utilization_review_date date [note: 'Date the utilization review was conducted.']
  utilization_review_decision varchar [note: 'Decision outcome of the utilization review.']
  utilization_review_decision_date date [note: 'Date the utilization review decision was finalized.']
  utilization_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of the utilization review process for this episode.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for episode_of_care. Referenced by episode_of_care_id.'
}

Table care.program {
  program_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the care program.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: Contracts specify which provider contracts cover each care program; needed for eligibility, reimbursement, and program performance reporting.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Needed for program budgeting; finance allocates expenses to cost centers per care program for HEDIS reporting and cost analysis.']
  formulary_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pharmacy.formulary. Business justification: Required for Care Program drug coverage design; the program’s eligibility and benefit rules depend on a specific formulary defining covered medications.']
  group_practice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.group_practice. Business justification: CMS requires linking each care program to its owning provider group for program ownership reporting and reimbursement audits.']
  ledger_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger. Business justification: Allows program expense transactions to be posted to specific GL ledger accounts for financial reporting and cost tracking.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Required for Program Ownership accountability report linking program_owner to the responsible employee.']
  provider_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: Regulatory and operational policies assign a specific provider as program manager, enabling accountability and performance tracking.']
  risk_pool_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.pool. Business justification: Program cost allocation to a specific risk pool is required for risk‑adjustment and financial reporting.']
  vendor_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor_contract. Business justification: Required for Program Contract Management report linking each care program to its governing vendor contract for compliance and cost tracking.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Organization that provides accreditation for the program.']
  accreditation_status varchar [note: 'Current accreditation state of the program (e.g., NCQA, URAC).']
  clinical_protocol varchar [note: 'Standardized clinical pathway or guideline applied within the program.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for program inquiries.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for program inquiries.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the program record was first created.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system that provides the master program data (e.g., Casenet TruCare).']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that determine member eligibility for enrollment in the program.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date the program is retired or no longer offered (nullable for open‑ended).']
  enrollment_cap varchar [note: 'Maximum number of members allowed to enroll in the program.']
  enrollment_current varchar [note: 'Number of members currently enrolled.']
  enrollment_end_date date [note: 'Date when enrollment closes for the program.']
  enrollment_start_date date [note: 'Date when enrollment opens for the program.']
  evidence_source varchar [note: 'Reference to the clinical study or guideline that validates the program.']
  hcc_included varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of HCC codes that are counted toward the program\'s risk adjustment.']
  hcc_version varchar [note: 'Version of the HCC model used for the program (e.g., 2024).']
  is_evidence_based boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the program is supported by clinical evidence.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date the program was last reviewed for clinical relevance or compliance.']
  line_of_business varchar [note: 'Business line to which the program applies.']
  outcome_actual varchar [note: 'Most recent observed value for the outcome measure.']
  outcome_measure varchar [note: 'Key performance indicator used to evaluate program effectiveness.']
  outcome_target varchar [note: 'Target value or threshold for the outcome measure.']
  program_category varchar [note: 'More granular category within the program type (e.g., diabetes, CHF, COPD).']
  program_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used to reference the program in operational systems.']
  program_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the program\'s purpose, services, and scope.']
  program_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the care program.']
  program_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the program.']
  program_type varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the program offering.']
  review_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the program is scheduled for review.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,4) [note: 'Factor used for risk‑adjusted payment calculations (e.g., 0.1234).']
  start_date date [note: 'Date the program becomes effective and available to members.']
  target_population varchar [note: 'Demographic or clinical segment the program is designed for.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent update to the program record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the program definition.']

  Note: 'Master registry of all care management, disease management, and case management programs offered by the health plan — including chronic condition programs (diabetes, CHF, COPD, asthma), complex case management, maternity management, behavioral health programs, and population health initiatives. Tracks program type, eligibility criteria, clinical protocols, accreditation standards (NCQA/URAC), program status, and line-of-business applicability. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista program configuration.'
}

Table care.care_enrollment {
  care_enrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each care enrollment record.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to the member for this enrollment.']
  group_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to employer.employer_group. Business justification: Required for Employer‑Sponsored Program Enrollment reporting and ACA employer‑level enrollment compliance; employers need to see which members enrolled via their group.']
  member_risk_score_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.member_risk_score. Business justification: Underwriting uses a member\'s risk score at enrollment; linking provides audit trail for premium determination.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member enrolled in the care program.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care, disease, or case management program to which the member is enrolled.']
  acuity_level varchar [note: 'Clinical acuity assigned to the member for this program.']
  care_manager_assigned_date date [note: 'Date the care manager was officially assigned to the member.']
  consent_status varchar [note: 'Member\'s consent status for participation and data sharing within the program.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the enrollment record was first created in the system.']
  disenrollment_date date [note: 'Actual date the member left the program.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Planned termination date of the enrollment (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the enrollment becomes effective.']
  enrollment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the enrollment, used in operational reporting and member communications.']
  enrollment_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the enrollment request, indicating how the member entered the program.']
  enrollment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the enrollment.']
  enrollment_type varchar [note: 'Category of care program (e.g., disease management).']
  hcc_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Aggregated HCC score associated with the member at enrollment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by care staff regarding the enrollment.']
  program_tier varchar [note: 'Level of service intensity offered by the program.']
  reason varchar [note: 'Business reason or clinical trigger for enrolling the member.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score used for prioritizing outreach (0‑100).']
  status_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for the current enrollment status (e.g., member request, clinical criteria).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the enrollment record.']

  Note: 'Tracks member enrollment into specific care management, disease management, or case management programs — capturing enrollment date, disenrollment date, enrollment source (outreach, referral, self-referral, claims-triggered, HRA-triggered), consent status, program tier, enrollment status, and acuity level. Represents the active participation record linking a member to a care program. Coordinator assignment details are maintained on the care_coordinator product. Distinct from health plan enrollment (owned by the enrollment domain). Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista.'
}

Table care.care_plan {
  care_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the care plan record.']
  care_member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member for whom the care plan is created.']
  care_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'FK to member.subscriber.subscriber_id — Care plans must resolve to a member for care gap closure tracking, HEDIS measure compliance, and Star Ratings reporting. Critical for population health management.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to manage the plan.']
  pharmacy_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Needed for Pharmacy Benefit Management integration; care plan references the pharmacy vendor responsible for medication fulfillment, used in cost and quality reporting.']
  primary_provider_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: Care plans must be overseen by a designated primary care provider to ensure care coordination and meet NCQA quality measures.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to care.program. Business justification: Plan belongs to a program; adding program_id FK establishes parent-child relationship and enables join to program attributes.']
  barriers_to_care varchar [note: 'Identified obstacles that may impede goal achievement (e.g., transportation, language).']
  care_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the care plan.']
  creation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the care plan record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the care plan expires or is terminated; null if open‑ended.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the care plan becomes effective for the member.']
  high_risk_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member meets high‑risk criteria for intensive management.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the care plan.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the care plan, e.g., "Diabetes Management Plan".']
  plan_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the care plan, used in member communications and reporting.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the care plan indicating its primary focus area.']
  privacy_consent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member has consented to share health information for care planning.']
  progress_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes documenting progress toward the goal.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite risk score (e.g., HCC/RAF) used to prioritize care management resources.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system that originated the care plan record.']
  version varchar [note: 'Incremental version number tracking revisions to the care plan.']

  Note: 'Individualized care plan created for a member enrolled in a care or case management program — documenting clinical and behavioral goals (goal description, category, target value, target date, status: active/achieved/abandoned, progress notes), interventions, barriers to care, target dates, care coordinator assignments, plan status, and clinical/progress notes. Goals are modeled as embedded detail records within the care plan with independent status tracking, enabling multi-dimensional progress measurement across clinical, behavioral, and SDOH goal categories. Single source of truth for all care plan goal lifecycle management. Supports longitudinal tracking of member health outcomes. Aligns with NCQA care management standards and CMS chronic care management (CCM) requirements. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista.'
}

Table care.plan_goal {
  plan_goal_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the care plan goal.']
  care_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care plan to which this goal belongs.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member responsible for overseeing the goal.']
  actual_date date [note: 'Date when the actual value was recorded.']
  actual_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured value achieved toward the goal.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the goal complies with clinical guidelines or regulatory requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the goal record was first created in the system.']
  goal_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the goal indicating its domain (e.g., clinical, behavioral, social determinant).']
  goal_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code assigned to the goal for reference and reporting.']
  goal_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the care plan goal.']
  measurement_type varchar [note: 'Source or method of the measurement (e.g., lab result, vital sign).']
  plan_goal_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the goal.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the goal to guide care team focus.']
  progress_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes documenting progress, barriers, or interventions related to the goal.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated risk score associated with the goal (e.g., based on HCC/RAF models).']
  target_date date [note: 'Date by which the goal is expected to be met.']
  target_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the target value.']
  target_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Numeric target the member should achieve (e.g., HbA1c 7.0).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the goal record.']

  Note: 'Individual clinical or behavioral goals defined within a member care plan — including goal description, goal category (clinical, behavioral, social determinants), target value, target date, goal status (active, achieved, abandoned), and progress notes. Each goal has its own lifecycle independent of the parent care plan, enabling granular tracking of member progress across multiple care dimensions.'
}

Table care.gap {
  gap_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the care gap record.']
  assigned_care_coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to address the gap.']
  claim_header_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the claim that contributed to closing the gap.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Required for HEDIS gap analysis reports that aggregate gaps by health plan, a regulatory reporting need.']
  member_risk_score_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.member_risk_score. Business justification: Care gap prioritization incorporates the member\'s risk score; FK ties gap records to the underlying risk score.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member associated with the care gap.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Network‑adequacy reports require linking each care gap to the provider network of the member\'s primary provider to assess coverage gaps.']
  resolution_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Closing care gaps may be assigned to specific vendors (e.g., labs); linking provides accountability and compliance reporting.']
  actual_resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was actually resolved.']
  clinical_category varchar [note: 'Clinical domain or condition associated with the gap (e.g., diabetes, cardiovascular).']
  close_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was resolved or closed (nullable if still open).']
  closure_method varchar [note: 'Method by which the care gap was closed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the care gap record was created in the lakehouse.']
  documentation_status varchar [note: 'Status of required documentation for the care gap.']
  gap_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the identified care gap.']
  gap_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the care gap.']
  gap_type varchar [note: 'Category of the care gap (e.g., preventive service, chronic condition management).']
  hedis_measure_code varchar [note: 'Standard HEDIS measure code linked to the care gap.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the gap is considered critical for member health.']
  measure_target_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Expected target value for the measure (e.g., HbA1c <7%).']
  open_date date [note: 'Date when the care gap was first identified.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business-assigned priority for addressing the care gap.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score associated with the gap (e.g., based on HCC/RAF).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that generated the care gap record.']
  target_date date [note: 'Desired date by which the care gap should be closed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the care gap record.']

  Note: 'Registry of identified care gaps for members — preventive services, chronic condition management measures, and HEDIS-aligned quality measures that have not been completed (e.g., HbA1c testing, mammography, colorectal cancer screening, medication adherence). Tracks gap type, HEDIS measure code, gap open date, gap close date, closure method (claim, supplemental data, attestation), and gap status. Core to HEDIS performance and Star Ratings improvement programs.'
}

Table care.coordinator {
  coordinator_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each care coordinator record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the coordinator\'s direct supervisor (another care coordinator).']
  external_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Some care coordinators are external vendor staff; linking tracks vendor‑provided coordination services for staffing and cost analysis.']
  record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to credential.credential_record. Business justification: Credentialing staff for care coordination requires linking each coordinator to their credential record for compliance reporting and audit of licensing/sanctions.']
  assigned_lob varchar [note: 'Business line for which the coordinator primarily provides services.']
  caseload_capacity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of members the coordinator can actively manage.']
  caseload_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weighted factor reflecting case complexity for workload balancing.']
  certification_codes varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of professional certifications (e.g., CCM, ACM, CPH).']
  coordinator_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the coordinator record.']
  current_caseload_count varchar [note: 'Number of members currently assigned to the coordinator.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address used for secure communications with the coordinator.']
  employment_status varchar [note: 'Current employment state of the coordinator.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'Given name of the care coordinator.']
  full_name varchar [note: 'Legal full name of the care coordinator as used in member communications and credentialing.']
  hire_date date [note: 'Date the coordinator was hired by the organization.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'Family name of the care coordinator.']
  last_training_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent mandatory training completed by the coordinator.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by supervisors or administrators about the coordinator.']
  organization_unit varchar [note: 'Department or unit within the health plan where the coordinator is assigned.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for reaching the coordinator.']
  primary_contact_method varchar [note: 'Preferred channel for contacting the coordinator.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the coordinator record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the coordinator record.']
  role_type varchar [note: 'Functional role of the coordinator within the care management domain.']
  specialty_area varchar [note: 'Clinical specialty or disease focus of the coordinator.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date the coordinator\'s employment ended, if applicable.']
  training_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of completed training programs (e.g., HEDIS, STAR).']

  Note: 'Master record for care coordinators, case managers, disease management nurses, and health coaches — capturing demographics, credentials (RN, LCSW, CHW), certifications (CCM, ACM), caseload capacity, specialty focus areas, assigned LOB, active status, and supervisor hierarchy. Single source of truth for coordinator-to-member assignment history including assignment date, assignment type (primary, backup, specialist), assignment reason, caseload weight, assignment status, reassignment/handoff tracking, and continuity-of-care documentation. Enables caseload management, workload balancing, continuity-of-care reporting, and coordinator performance analytics. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista workforce configuration.'
}

Table care.care_coordinator_assignment {
  care_coordinator_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each coordinator assignment record.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the care coordinator assigned to the member or case.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member receiving care coordination.']
  um_case_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific care case or enrollment to which the coordinator is assigned.']
  assignment_date date [note: 'Date on which the coordinator assignment became effective.']
  assignment_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level indicating urgency of the assignment.']
  assignment_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason for creating the assignment (e.g., new diagnosis, care gap, member request).']
  assignment_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the assignment record (e.g., entered manually by staff, generated by system rules).']
  assignment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the assignment.']
  assignment_type varchar [note: 'Role of the coordinator in this assignment.']
  caseload_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Relative workload weight assigned to the coordinator for this case (e.g., 1.00 = standard, >1.00 = higher complexity).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assignment record was first created in the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Start date of the assignment\'s validity period.']
  effective_until date [note: 'End date of the assignment\'s validity period; null if open-ended.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments or contextual information about the assignment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the assignment record.']

  Note: 'Assignment record linking a care coordinator to a specific member care enrollment or case — capturing assignment date, assignment type (primary, backup, specialist), assignment reason, caseload weight, and assignment status. Tracks the full history of coordinator-to-member assignments including reassignments and handoffs. Enables caseload management, workload balancing, and continuity-of-care reporting.'
}

Table care.member_outreach {
  member_outreach_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each outreach activity record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the person or system that executed the outreach.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who was contacted.']
  outreach_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Outreach activities are often outsourced to call‑center vendors; linking enables performance metrics and regulatory reporting of member contact.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Communication channel through which the outreach was performed.']
  compliance_consent_obtained boolean [note: 'True when required consent for contacting the member was documented.']
  consent_obtained_date date [note: 'Date on which the member gave consent for outreach communications.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outreach record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  follow_up_due_date date [note: 'Target date for completing any required follow‑up.']
  follow_up_required boolean [note: 'True when additional contact or action is needed after the outreach.']
  is_automated boolean [note: 'True if the outreach was generated by an automated workflow; false if manual.']
  language_preference varchar [note: 'Preferred language of the member for outreach communications.']
  member_outreach_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle state of the outreach activity record.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Observed outcome of the outreach interaction.']
  outcome_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outcome of the outreach was logged.']
  outreach_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Length of the phone call or interaction measured in seconds.']
  outreach_notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or details recorded about the outreach.']
  outreach_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the outreach attempt occurred.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Reason for contacting the member, such as enrolling in a program or closing a care gap.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record that originated the outreach activity (e.g., Casenet TruCare, Altruista, Member Portal).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the outreach record.']

  Note: 'Records of outreach activities conducted by care coordinators or automated systems to engage high-risk members in care management programs — including outreach date, outreach channel (phone, mail, SMS, portal), outreach purpose (program enrollment, care gap closure, HRA completion, medication adherence), outcome (reached, left voicemail, refused, enrolled), and follow-up requirements. Supports population health engagement tracking and HEDIS outreach documentation.'
}

Table care.hra {
  hra_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each health risk assessment record.']
  assessment_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Health risk assessments are conducted by third‑party vendors; linking supports audit of assessment source and compliance.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or system that performed the assessment.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member who completed the assessment.']
  questionnaire_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the questionnaire definition used.']
  answered_questions varchar [note: 'Number of questions answered by the member.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the health risk assessment was performed.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the assessment record.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the record is a Health Risk Assessment or a Social Determinants of Health screening.']
  assessment_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the assessment questionnaire used.']
  community_resource_referrals varchar [note: 'List of community resources referred to the member based on assessment findings.']
  completion_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the member completed the assessment.']
  compliance_cms_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if the assessment is required for CMS reporting.']
  compliance_ncqa_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if the assessment satisfies NCQA SDOH standards.']
  identified_health_risks varchar [note: 'Free‑text list of clinical health risks identified in the assessment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by the assessor.']
  questionnaire_version varchar [note: 'Version string of the questionnaire definition.']
  recommended_programs varchar [note: 'Care programs or interventions recommended for the member.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was first created in the data warehouse.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the assessment record.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk score calculated from the assessment responses.']
  risk_score_percentile decimal(5,2) [note: 'Member\'s risk score percentile compared to the plan population.']
  risk_tier varchar [note: 'Risk tier derived from the risk score.']
  screening_tool varchar [note: 'Name of the questionnaire or tool used for the assessment.']
  sdoh_education boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported education-related barriers.']
  sdoh_financial_strain boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported financial strain.']
  sdoh_food_insecurity boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported food insecurity.']
  sdoh_housing_instability boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported housing instability.']
  sdoh_social_isolation boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported social isolation.']
  sdoh_transportation boolean [note: 'Indicates if the member reported transportation barriers.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system of record that supplied the assessment data.']
  total_questions varchar [note: 'Total number of questions in the questionnaire.']

  Note: 'Health Risk Assessment (HRA) and Social Determinants of Health (SDOH) screening records completed by members — capturing assessment date, assessment type (HRA, SDOH screening), assessment version, screening tool (plan-specific HRA, AHC HRSN, PRAPARE, Hunger Vital Sign), completion channel (portal, phone, mail), risk score, risk tier (low, moderate, high, very high), identified health risks, SDOH domain flags (food insecurity, housing instability, transportation, social isolation, financial strain, education), community resource referrals, recommended programs, and assessment status. Includes the versioned questionnaire catalog (question text, category, response type, scoring weight) and individual member responses with clinical flag triggers. Single source of truth for all member health risk and SDOH assessments. HRAs are a CMS-required data element for Medicare Advantage plans and drive care program enrollment and risk stratification. SDOH screenings support CMS health equity requirements and NCQA SDOH standards. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista.'
}

Table care.condition_registry {
  condition_registry_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each condition registry record.']
  care_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care plan linked to this condition, if any.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to whom the condition applies.']
  risk_underwriting_case_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.risk_underwriting_case. Business justification: Underwriting cases reference member conditions; linking enables traceability of medical evidence used in risk classification.']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the condition is currently active for the member.']
  condition_category varchar [note: 'Business classification of the condition (e.g., HCC‑mapped, HEDIS chronic, behavioral health).']
  condition_code varchar [note: 'Standard ICD-10 diagnosis code representing the clinical condition.']
  condition_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable description of the condition.']
  confirmation_status varchar [note: 'Current confirmation state of the condition record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the condition record was first created.']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Current data quality assessment of the condition record.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date the condition ceased to be effective (null if still active).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date the condition became effective for care program eligibility.']
  hcc_code varchar [note: 'HCC code derived from the condition for risk adjustment scoring.']
  identification_date date [note: 'Date the condition was first identified for the member.']
  identification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to identify the condition for the member.']
  is_chronic boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the condition is considered chronic for HEDIS and risk adjustment.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date the condition record was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text clinical notes or comments about the condition.']
  onset_date date [note: 'Date when the condition first manifested.']
  population_segment varchar [note: 'Segment of the member population based on the condition\'s risk level.']
  raf_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated RAF score associated with the condition.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the condition was resolved or considered inactive.']
  risk_adjustment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the condition contributes to risk‑adjusted payments.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Clinical severity level of the condition.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the condition data.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the condition record.']

  Note: 'Chronic condition registry identifying members with specific diagnosed conditions — including ICD-10 condition code, condition category (HCC-mapped, HEDIS chronic condition, behavioral health), identification method (claims-based, EHR, provider attestation, HRA), identification date, confirmation status, and active/inactive flag. Serves as the authoritative clinical condition roster within the care domain for care program targeting, population health stratification, and HEDIS measure eligibility determination. References the risk domain for authoritative HCC/RAF scoring. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista clinical data.'
}

Table care.hedis_measure {
  hedis_measure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the HEDIS measure. [_canonical_skip_reason: REFERENCE_LOOKUP - catalog of HEDIS quality measures]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the measure record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_collection_methodology varchar [note: 'Method used to collect data for the measure (administrative, hybrid, or survey).']
  denominator_definition varchar [note: 'Exact definition of the denominator component of the measure.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the measure became effective for reporting.']
  eligible_population_criteria varchar [note: 'Eligibility rules that define the member cohort for the measure.']
  exclusion_criteria varchar [note: 'Conditions or member attributes that exclude a member from the denominator.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the measure record.']
  measure_code varchar [note: 'Official NCQA code that uniquely identifies the measure.']
  measure_denominator_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression or algorithm used to compute the denominator.']
  measure_description varchar [note: 'Full textual description of what the measure evaluates.']
  measure_domain varchar [note: 'High‑level domain of the measure (e.g., effectiveness of care, access/availability, utilization).']
  measure_exclusion_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression defining exclusions from the denominator.']
  measure_last_reviewed_date date [note: 'Date when the measure definition was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  measure_last_updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system that performed the most recent update.']
  measure_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the HEDIS quality measure.']
  measure_national_benchmark decimal(5,2) [note: 'National average performance for the measure (percentage).']
  measure_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the measure.']
  measure_numerator_logic varchar [note: 'Detailed logical expression or algorithm used to compute the numerator.']
  measure_owner varchar [note: 'Business unit or team responsible for the measure.']
  measure_related_hcc varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Hierarchical Condition Category (HCC) codes relevant to the measure.']
  measure_related_raf varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Risk Adjustment Factor (RAF) variables linked to the measure.']
  measure_reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the measure is reported (annual, semi‑annual, quarterly).']
  measure_scoring_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate the final score (e.g., rate, percentage, binary).']
  measure_star_rating_impact varchar [note: 'Explanation of how the measure influences Medicare Star Ratings.']
  measure_state_benchmark decimal(5,2) [note: 'State‑level average performance for the measure (percentage).']
  measure_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the measure.']
  measure_target_value decimal(10,2) [note: 'Target performance value or threshold for the measure.']
  measure_url varchar [note: 'Link to the official documentation or specification for the measure.']
  measurement_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the measure is defined.']
  numerator_definition varchar [note: 'Exact definition of the numerator component of the measure.']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date when the measure was retired or superseded (null if still active).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that maintains the measure definition (e.g., Casenet TruCare, Altruista).']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the measure definition, incremented on each change.']

  Note: 'Reference catalog of HEDIS (Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set) quality measures maintained by NCQA — including measure ID, measure name, measure domain (effectiveness of care, access/availability, utilization), measurement year, eligible population criteria, numerator definition, denominator definition, exclusion criteria, and data collection methodology (administrative, hybrid, survey). Authoritative reference for HEDIS performance tracking and Star Ratings.'
}

Table care.hedis_result {
  hedis_result_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each HEDIS result record.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan under which the member is enrolled.']
  hedis_measure_id varchar [note: 'Standard code for the HEDIS quality measure (e.g., HM-001).']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the member to whom the HEDIS result applies.']
  provider_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provider associated with the source claim or service.']
  audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the HEDIS result record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the HEDIS result record.']
  collection_method varchar [note: 'Methodology used to collect the underlying data for the measure.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance outcome for the member on this measure.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data used to determine the HEDIS result.']
  denominator_criteria_met boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member satisfied the denominator condition (typically eligibility).']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Logical definition of the member population eligible for the measure.']
  exclusion_criteria varchar [note: 'Specific criteria that triggered the member\'s exclusion.']
  exclusion_reason varchar [note: 'Reason or code describing why the member was excluded.']
  is_excluded boolean [note: 'True if the member is excluded from the measure based on exclusion criteria.']
  measure_category varchar [note: 'Category grouping of the measure (e.g., preventive, chronic).']
  measure_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score assigned to the member for the measure (if applicable).']
  measure_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the measure as process, outcome, or structure.']
  measure_version varchar [note: 'Version or edition of the measure as published by NCQA.']
  measurement_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the HEDIS measurement is reported.']
  numerator_criteria_met boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member satisfied the numerator condition for the measure.']
  result_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the HEDIS result was calculated.']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the underlying source record (e.g., claim ID, lab result ID).']
  source_record_type varchar [note: 'Type of the source record that supplied data for the result.']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for HEDIS (Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set) quality measure definitions and member-level compliance results. Contains the authoritative NCQA-published measure catalog (measure ID, name, domain: effectiveness of care/access/availability/utilization, measurement year, eligible population criteria, numerator/denominator definitions, exclusion criteria, data collection methodology: administrative/hybrid/survey) and member-level results indicating whether each member met numerator criteria for a given measurement year. Tracks data source (claim, lab, supplemental, medical record), compliance status (compliant, non-compliant, excluded), and hybrid audit trail. Aggregated to produce plan-level HEDIS rates submitted to NCQA for Star Ratings, accreditation, and quality bonus payments.'
}

Table care.cahps_survey {
  cahps_survey_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each CAHPS survey record.']
  member_enrollment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the health plan the member was enrolled in during the survey.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the member who completed the survey.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the survey vendor.']
  administration_method varchar [note: 'Method used to deliver the survey to members.']
  composite_score_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the overall score is a composite of domain scores.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the survey record was first loaded into the warehouse.']
  customer_service_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Average score for the "Customer Service" domain.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system that supplied the survey data (e.g., "Casenet TruCare").']
  doctor_communication_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Average score for the "Doctor Communication" domain.']
  external_survey_code varchar [note: 'External identifier used by the survey vendor or regulatory reporting (e.g., vendor‑assigned code).']
  getting_care_quickly_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Average score for the "Getting Care Quickly" domain.']
  getting_needed_care_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Average score for the "Getting Needed Care" domain.']
  is_test_survey boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the record represents a test or pilot survey.']
  member_age varchar [note: 'Age of the member at the time of survey administration.']
  member_gender varchar [note: 'Gender of the member.']
  member_state varchar [note: 'Two‑letter state code of the member\'s residence.']
  member_zip varchar [note: 'Five‑digit ZIP code of the member\'s residence.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for any additional comments or observations about the survey.']
  overall_satisfaction_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Composite overall satisfaction rating derived from the survey.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the survey results are included in CMS Star Ratings reporting.']
  response_deadline date [note: 'Final date by which members could submit responses.']
  response_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of sampled members who returned a completed survey.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of members selected for the survey sample.']
  sampling_frame varchar [note: 'Description of the member population from which the sample was drawn.']
  star_rating_impact_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Score representing the contribution of this survey to the plan\'s Star Rating.']
  survey_end_date date [note: 'Date when the survey administration closed.']
  survey_language varchar [note: 'Language in which the survey was presented to the member.']
  survey_mode varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the survey was self‑administered or conducted by an interviewer.']
  survey_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the CAHPS survey (e.g., "2023 Health Plan CAHPS").']
  survey_start_date date [note: 'Date when the survey administration began.']
  survey_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the survey.']
  survey_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the CAHPS survey variant.']
  survey_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the survey instrument.']
  survey_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year the survey was administered.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the survey record.']

  Note: 'CAHPS (Consumer Assessment of Healthcare Providers and Systems) survey administration and response records — capturing survey type (Health Plan CAHPS, Medicare CAHPS, PCMH CAHPS), survey year, administration method (mail, phone, mixed), member sampling frame, survey vendor, response status, overall satisfaction score, and individual member responses by question with composite score contribution flags. CAHPS results feed directly into CMS Star Ratings and NCQA accreditation. Enables drill-down analysis of member experience drivers across CAHPS domains (getting needed care, getting care quickly, doctor communication, customer service). Source: Survey vendor data.'
}

Table care.population_segment {
  population_segment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the population segment.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator or team responsible for the segment.']
  audit_created_by varchar [note: 'User or process that initially created the segment record.']
  audit_updated_by varchar [note: 'User or process that performed the most recent update to the segment record.']
  average_pmpm_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average per‑member‑per‑month cost for members in the segment.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the segment record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date on which the segment becomes effective for member assignment.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date on which the segment expires or is superseded (null for open‑ended).']
  inclusion_criteria_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the clinical and demographic rules that define segment membership.']
  is_default boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this segment is the default fallback for uncategorized members.']
  last_run_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent execution of the segment calculation engine.']
  last_run_user varchar [note: 'User or service account that triggered the most recent segment refresh.']
  pmpm_cost_band varchar [note: 'Cost band indicating expected average PMPM expense for the segment.']
  population_count varchar [note: 'Number of members currently assigned to the segment.']
  population_segment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the segment.']
  recommended_care_program varchar [note: 'Name or code of the care management program recommended for members in this segment.']
  risk_tier varchar [note: 'Risk tier classification for the segment used to prioritize care management outreach.']
  segment_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the segment, often used in external systems and analytics.']
  segment_description varchar [note: 'Extended description providing context and business purpose of the segment.']
  segment_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the segment used for reporting and UI display.']
  segment_owner_role varchar [note: 'Role of the owner (e.g., care_coordinator, population_health_manager).']
  segment_type varchar [note: 'Methodology used to create the segment (e.g., predictive risk model, HCC‑based, claims‑based, or custom).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that generated the segment definition.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the segment record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the segment definition; increments when criteria change.']

  Note: 'Population health stratification segments defining risk tiers and care management targeting criteria — including segment name, stratification model (predictive risk model, HCC-based, claims-based), risk tier (low, rising risk, high, catastrophic), inclusion criteria, recommended care program, PMPM cost band, and effective date. Used to assign members to appropriate care management interventions and prioritize outreach resources. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista population health module.'
}

Table care.member_risk_tier {
  member_risk_tier_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each risk‑tier record.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member to which the tier assignment applies.']
  assignment_date date [note: 'Date the tier was assigned to the member.']
  assignment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to assign the tier to a member.']
  chronic_condition_flag boolean [note: 'True if the member has at least one chronic condition flagged.']
  claims_count_last_year varchar [note: 'Number of claims submitted by the member in the prior 12 months.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the tier record was first created.']
  demographic_group varchar [note: 'Broad demographic segment of the member.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the tier definition becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the tier definition expires (null for open‑ended).']
  hcc_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Hierarchical Condition Category score used for RAF calculations.']
  inclusion_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that determine member eligibility for this tier.']
  is_current boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this row represents the member\'s current active tier.']
  member_risk_tier_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the tier definition.']
  model_type varchar [note: 'Type of model used to generate the tier assignment.']
  next_reassessment_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next risk‑tier reassessment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or audit notes.']
  pmpm_cost_band varchar [note: 'Per‑Member‑Per‑Month cost band associated with the tier.']
  recommended_care_program varchar [note: 'Name or code of the care program recommended for members in this tier.']
  risk_factor_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weight applied to the risk factor in the predictive model.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score associated with the tier (higher indicates greater risk).']
  risk_score_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the risk score used for the assignment.']
  segment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the segment criteria.']
  segment_name varchar [note: 'Name of the population segment definition linked to this tier.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record that supplied the tier data.']
  tier_band varchar [note: 'Broad risk band classification.']
  tier_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier/code used to reference the tier in downstream systems.']
  tier_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the risk tier (e.g., "High Risk").']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the tier record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the tier definition for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Member-level risk tier assignment and population health stratification — containing population segment definitions (segment name, stratification model: predictive risk model/HCC-based/claims-based, risk tier bands: low/rising risk/high/catastrophic, inclusion criteria, recommended care program, PMPM cost band, effective date) and member-specific tier assignments (risk score, assignment date, assignment method: automated model/manual override/clinical review, next reassessment date). Single source of truth for both population segment configuration and member-level risk tier history. Tracks risk tier changes over time to support longitudinal population health management and care program targeting. Distinct from CMS RAF scores (owned by the risk domain) — this covers all LOBs and internal stratification models. Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista population health module.'
}

Table care.snf_stay {
  snf_stay_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key uniquely identifying the SNF stay record.']
  care_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care plan associated with the SNF stay.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: SNF stays are reimbursed under specific provider contracts; linking enables claim adjudication and cost tracking per contract.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to manage the SNF stay.']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.facility. Business justification: Linking SNF stays to the facility master record supports quality reporting, cost analysis, and CMS SNF performance metrics.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member/patient associated with the SNF stay.']
  pa_request_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the prior authorization that approved the SNF stay.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Skilled‑nursing facility stays are billed through contracted networks; linking enables utilization and cost tracking per network.']
  risk_pool_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to risk.pool. Business justification: SNF stay costs are allocated to a risk pool for actuarial and reporting purposes.']
  admission_diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD‑10 code representing the primary diagnosis at SNF admission.']
  admission_diagnosis_description varchar [note: 'Full textual description of the admission diagnosis.']
  admission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the member was admitted to the SNF.']
  care_gap_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a documented care gap exists for the member during the stay.']
  concurrent_review_schedule_date date [note: 'Planned date for the concurrent utilization review of the stay.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary amounts. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USD|EUR|GBP|CAD|JPY|... — promote to reference product]']
  discharge_destination varchar [note: 'Destination where the member was discharged (e.g., home, rehab, hospital).']
  discharge_planning_status varchar [note: 'Current status of discharge planning activities.']
  discharge_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the member was discharged from the SNF.']
  drg_code varchar [note: 'DRG code assigned to the SNF stay for reimbursement purposes.']
  hcc_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Risk adjustment score derived from member\'s clinical conditions.']
  is_eligible_for_medicare boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member is eligible for Medicare during the stay.']
  is_eligible_for_medicare_advantage boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the member is eligible for Medicare Advantage during the stay.']
  length_of_stay_days varchar [note: 'Calculated total number of days the member stayed in the SNF.']
  net_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Net amount payable after adjustments.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text clinical notes captured by care managers during the stay.']
  patient_condition_at_admission varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the patient’s clinical condition at admission.']
  readmission_reason varchar [note: 'Reason documented for any readmission within 30 days.']
  readmission_risk_flag boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the member is at high risk of readmission.']
  readmission_within_30_days boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the member was readmitted within 30 days of discharge.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the SNF stay record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the SNF stay record.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,2) [note: 'Factor applied for risk‑adjusted payment calculations.']
  snf_facility_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the SNF facility providing post‑acute care.']
  snf_stay_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the SNF stay.']
  snf_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the SNF facility type.']
  stay_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the SNF stay used in reporting and claims.']
  total_adjustment_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total monetary adjustments (discounts, contractual allowances) applied to the gross charge.']
  total_charge_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Gross charge amount billed for the SNF stay before adjustments.']
  transition_of_care_plan varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the transition‑of‑care plan for the member after discharge.']

  Note: 'Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF) post-acute stay records managed by the care management team — capturing admission date, discharge date, SNF facility NPI, admission diagnosis, care coordinator assigned, concurrent review schedule, discharge planning status, readmission risk flag, and transition-of-care plan. Care management owns SNF coordination distinct from utilization management which owns the PA authorization. Supports CMS SNF quality reporting and readmission reduction programs.'
}

Table care.dme_coordination {
  dme_coordination_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the DME coordination record.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: DME coordination services are governed by contracts with suppliers; the FK supports payment, compliance, and utilization reporting.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to manage the DME.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member receiving the DME.']
  provider_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.provider_provider. Business justification: Associating DME coordination with the ordering provider enables compliance tracking and accurate billing under Medicare rules.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the coordination meets all applicable CMS/HIPAA compliance requirements.']
  coordination_reason varchar [note: 'Clinical or functional reason for DME coordination (e.g., chronic respiratory condition).']
  coordination_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the DME coordination process.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the DME coordination record was first created.']
  delivery_date date [note: 'Date the DME was delivered to the member.']
  dme_model varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model name or number of the DME.']
  dme_serial_number varchar [note: 'Serial number of the DME unit for traceability.']
  dme_type varchar [note: 'Category of DME being coordinated.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the DME coordination ends or is no longer covered (nullable).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the DME coordination becomes effective for coverage.']
  follow_up_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for follow‑up assessment after DME delivery.']
  follow_up_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes from the follow‑up visit.']
  last_status_change_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the coordination_status last changed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form information related to the DME coordination.']
  order_date date [note: 'Date the DME was ordered.']
  prior_authorization_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the prior authorization request.']
  prior_authorization_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether prior authorization is required for the DME.']
  prior_authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the prior authorization request.']
  supplier_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the DME supplier or vendor.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the DME coordination record.']
  urgency_level varchar [note: 'Priority assigned to the DME coordination based on clinical need.']

  Note: 'Durable Medical Equipment (DME) coordination records managed by care management for high-risk members — capturing DME type (wheelchair, CPAP, oxygen, infusion pump), ordering provider NPI, DME supplier NPI, order date, delivery date, coordination status, care coordinator assigned, and follow-up schedule. Supports post-acute care transitions and chronic condition management where DME is a critical care component. Distinct from DME claims (owned by the claim domain).'
}

Table care.barrier {
  barrier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each documented barrier to care.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care manager who recorded or is responsible for the barrier.']
  member_subscriber_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member experiencing the barrier.']
  mitigation_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Barrier mitigation can be performed by external vendors; linking supports cost allocation and effectiveness reporting.']
  barrier_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description of the specific barrier identified.']
  barrier_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the barrier record.']
  barrier_type varchar [note: 'Category of the barrier affecting care access.']
  care_manager_assigned_date date [note: 'Date the care manager was assigned to the member for this barrier.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when the barrier record was first created.']
  documentation_source varchar [note: 'Reference to the source document or note ID where the barrier was originally recorded.']
  expected_resolution_date date [note: 'Target date by which the barrier is expected to be resolved.']
  follow_up_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for a follow‑up check on barrier status.']
  follow_up_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a follow‑up action is scheduled after the initial intervention.']
  geographic_location varchar [note: 'Five‑digit ZIP code of the member\'s residence (used for geographic analysis).']
  hcc_impact boolean [note: 'True if the barrier is expected to affect Hierarchical Condition Category scoring.']
  identification_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the barrier information (e.g., Health Risk Assessment, care coordinator assessment).']
  identification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the barrier was first recorded.']
  impact_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative score (0-100) representing the barrier\'s impact on member health outcomes.']
  intervention_applied varchar [note: 'Narrative of the action taken to address the barrier.']
  intervention_type varchar [note: 'Standardized category of the intervention applied.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the barrier is deemed critical for immediate action.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Supplemental free-text notes captured by care staff.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the barrier was resolved or closed.']
  resolution_notes varchar [note: 'Detailed notes describing how the barrier was resolved or why it remains open.']
  resolution_outcome varchar [note: 'Final outcome classification after the barrier handling process.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,4) [note: 'Factor indicating how the barrier influences the member\'s risk adjustment score.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Assessed severity of the barrier\'s impact on care.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that captured the barrier information.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp of the most recent update to the barrier record.']

  Note: 'Documented barriers to care identified during care management interactions — including barrier type (transportation, cost, language, health literacy, SDOH, medication adherence, provider access), identification date, identification source (HRA, coordinator assessment, member self-report), resolution status, resolution date, and intervention applied. Enables SDOH-driven care management and supports CMS health equity reporting requirements.'
}

Table care.transition {
  transition_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each care transition record.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to contract.provider_contract. Business justification: Care transitions (e.g., hospital to SNF) are covered by contracts that define coverage rules; needed for transition planning and financial accountability.']
  coordinator_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the care coordinator assigned to manage the transition.']
  equipment_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: Transitions may involve equipment supplied by vendors; linking records the equipment vendor for discharge planning and readmission risk analysis.']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to provider.facility. Business justification: Transitions of care require identifying the destination facility for readmission risk assessment and discharge planning compliance.']
  health_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to plan.health_plan. Business justification: Enables plan‑level readmission and transition risk metrics used in quality and compliance reporting.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member undergoing the care transition.']
  provider_network_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to network.provider_network. Business justification: Transitions between care settings must reference the provider network to coordinate discharge planning and readmission risk assessment.']
  care_gap_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the transition addresses a documented care gap.']
  compliance_consent_obtained boolean [note: 'True when the member has provided consent for data sharing required for transition reporting.']
  concurrent_review_schedule_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next concurrent utilization review while in SNF.']
  consent_obtained_date date [note: 'Date the required consent was captured.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the transition record was first created in the system.']
  discharge_planning_status varchar [note: 'Current status of discharge planning activities.']
  dme_coordination_status varchar [note: 'Current status of DME coordination and installation.']
  dme_delivery_date date [note: 'Date the DME was delivered to the member.']
  dme_equipment_type varchar [note: 'Category of DME ordered for the member during transition.']
  dme_order_date date [note: 'Date the DME order was placed.']
  dme_ordering_supplier_npi varchar [note: 'NPI of the supplier providing the DME.']
  duration_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between from_setting departure and to_setting arrival.']
  follow_up_schedule_date date [note: 'Planned date for post‑transition follow‑up with the member.']
  from_setting varchar [note: 'Care setting from which the member is moving (e.g., hospital, skilled nursing facility).']
  hcc_risk_factor decimal(5,2) [note: 'Risk adjustment factor derived from HCCs relevant to the transition.']
  is_critical_transition boolean [note: 'True if the transition is flagged as clinically critical (e.g., high‑risk patient).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form comments captured by care staff.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the transition event for the member.']
  readmission_risk_assessment_date date [note: 'Date the readmission risk score was calculated.']
  readmission_risk_flag boolean [note: 'True when the readmission risk score exceeds the configured threshold.']
  readmission_risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Predictive score (0‑100) indicating likelihood of readmission within 30 days.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,2) [note: 'Overall risk adjustment factor applied for payment modeling.']
  snf_admission_date date [note: 'Date the member was admitted to the skilled nursing facility.']
  snf_admission_diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD‑10 code representing the primary diagnosis at SNF admission.']
  snf_discharge_date date [note: 'Date the member was discharged from the skilled nursing facility.']
  snf_facility_npi varchar [note: 'National Provider Identifier of the SNF receiving the member.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the transition record.']
  to_setting varchar [note: 'Care setting to which the member is transferred.']
  toc_plan_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the Transition of Care (TOC) plan was fully completed.']
  transition_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable business identifier assigned to the transition for tracking and reporting.']
  transition_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the transition record.']
  transition_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the transition occurred.']
  transition_type varchar [note: 'Type of transition event (e.g., discharge, transfer).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the transition record.']

  Note: 'Single source of truth for care transitions and all post-acute coordination — tracking member movements between care settings (hospital to home, hospital to SNF, SNF to home, ED to outpatient) and associated post-acute service management. Includes SNF stay records (admission/discharge dates, facility NPI, admission diagnosis, concurrent review schedule, discharge planning status, readmission risk flag) and DME coordination (equipment type, ordering/supplier NPI, order/delivery dates, coordination status, follow-up schedule). Captures transition date, from/to settings, transition type, care coordinator assigned, TOC plan completion status, readmission risk score, and transition outcome. Supports CMS Transitions of Care (TOC) HEDIS measure, SNF quality reporting, readmission reduction programs, and chronic condition DME management. Distinct from utilization management PA authorizations (owned by utilization domain) and DME claims (owned by claim domain). Source: Casenet TruCare or Altruista.'
}

Table care.star_rating_result {
  star_rating_result_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each star rating result record.']
  contract_provider_contract_id varchar [note: 'External contract or plan identifier (H/S-number) associated with the star rating.']
  hedis_measure_id varchar [note: 'Unique CMS identifier for the specific quality measure (e.g., "M001").']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the star rating result record was first loaded into the lakehouse.']
  cutpoint_1_star decimal(5,2) [note: 'Performance threshold required to achieve a 1‑star rating for the measure.']
  cutpoint_2_star decimal(5,2) [note: 'Performance threshold required to achieve a 2‑star rating for the measure.']
  cutpoint_3_star decimal(5,2) [note: 'Performance threshold required to achieve a 3‑star rating for the measure.']
  cutpoint_4_star decimal(5,2) [note: 'Performance threshold required to achieve a 4‑star rating for the measure.']
  cutpoint_5_star decimal(5,2) [note: 'Performance threshold required to achieve a 5‑star rating for the measure.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the rating data – either CMS‑published or internally derived.']
  domain_star_score varchar [note: 'Aggregated star score for the domain (Part C or Part D).']
  improvement_measure_flag boolean [note: 'True if the measure is designated as an improvement measure for the rating period.']
  measure_name varchar [note: 'Full descriptive name of the CMS quality measure.']
  measure_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weight (percentage) of the measure in the calculation of the overall star rating.']
  measurement_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the star rating measurement was performed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or observations about the rating result.']
  overall_star_rating varchar [note: 'Final overall star rating (1‑5) for the contract/plan.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the health plan for which the rating is calculated.']
  quality_bonus_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the plan qualifies for the CMS Quality Bonus Payment.']
  rating_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable label for the star rating result (e.g., "2023 Medicare Advantage Star Rating").']
  rating_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the rating result.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system that supplied the rating data (e.g., "Casenet TruCare").']
  star_domain varchar [note: 'Domain of the star rating (Part C, Part D, or overall).']
  star_score varchar [note: 'Star score (1‑5) awarded for the specific measure.']
  trend_direction varchar [note: 'Direction of change compared to the prior year (up, down, or stable).']
  trend_star_score varchar [note: 'Star score achieved in the trend comparison year.']
  trend_year varchar [note: 'Prior year used for year‑over‑year star rating trend analysis.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the star rating result record.']

  Note: 'CMS Star Ratings measure definitions and plan-level/contract-level results for Medicare Advantage and Part D plans. Contains the CMS-published measure catalog (measure ID, name, Star domain, data source, cut points for each star level 1-5, measure weight) and actual plan results including contract ID (H/S-number), measurement year, individual measure star scores, domain star scores, summary/Part C/Part D star ratings, quality bonus payment (QBP) eligibility, improvement measures, and year-over-year trends. Single source of truth for Star Ratings measure definitions and plan-level performance. Supports executive reporting, quality improvement prioritization, CMS audit readiness, and QBP revenue forecasting.'
}

Table care.sdoh_assessment {
  sdoh_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the SDOH assessment record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member who performed the assessment.']
  member_identity_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the member being assessed.']
  resource_vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vendor.vendor. Business justification: SDOH referrals often go to community‑resource vendors; linking enables outcome tracking and vendor performance measurement.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the SDOH assessment was conducted.']
  assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score summarizing assessment risk (if applicable).']
  assessment_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the assessment instrument used.']
  confidentiality_consent_flag boolean [note: 'Member\'s consent for sharing SDOH data.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was created.']
  follow_up_due_date date [note: 'Date by which follow-up should be completed.']
  follow_up_status varchar [note: 'Current status of follow-up actions.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes captured during assessment.']
  referral_made_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a referral to community resources was made.']
  referral_resource varchar [note: 'Name or code of the community resource referred.']
  risk_adjustment_factor decimal(5,4) [note: 'Factor used for risk adjustment calculations (e.g., HCC).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk level determined from the assessment.']
  screening_tool varchar [note: 'Standardized tool used to conduct the assessment.']
  sdoh_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the assessment record.']
  sdoh_domain varchar [note: 'Domain of social determinant assessed.']
